mapper.select: select * from hy_login_log a where a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into hy_login_log ( id, username, loginip, hostname, browser, osname, logintime, result, xm, type, role )values( #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{browser,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{osname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logintime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{role,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
)
